analysis.reasoning: Core message: Lavrov claims Latvia and Estonia discriminate against Russian-speaking residents, calling statelessness a shameful phenomenon that deprives them of basic democratic rights. Evaluation: RU1 (The West and their allies are immoral, hostile and decadent) — Yes. By accusing Latvia and Estonia (Western-aligned states) of discriminatory, anti-democratic practices against Russian-speakers, the tweet portrays Western allies as immoral/hostile and Russians as victims, matching RU1. RU2 — No mention of alternative systems or multipolar cooperation. RU3 — No framing of Russia as a benevolent partner or mediator. RU4 — No historical glorification. RU5 — No current success showcase. RU6 — No cultural/nature content. Conclusion: Only RU1 is promoted.
